data.content_ref: inline:The proposed abstraction mischaracterizes the relationship between the endpoints as a chain of 'subsumption' (each artifact negating and generalizing its predecessor's impossibility claim), but this conflates a negative generalization (30e483eb's 'no fixed precision/recall regime suffices') with a positive mechanistic reduction (c9386a6c's per-question flag-rate inequality). c9386a6c does not merely broaden 30e483eb's impossibility to the full fixed-parameter space; it replaces the fixed-parameter framing entirely with a question-conditional variable model. These are not subsets of a single constraint family — one is a point-set impossibility in global parameter space, the other is a per-question covariance condition — so the claimed shared fixed-parameter impossibility axis does not hold.
